creator: mirror176@hotmail.com
text:
I have copied in the maintainer of audio/openal as the problem seems
fixable from audio/openal with the following patches and this problem
also caused games/el , games/assaultcube and devel/simgear to fail to
update for the same reasons on my FreeBSD 7.1-RELEASE-p2 and an up to
date ports tree.
 The following patches patch-src-arch-i386-memcpy_mmx_prk.nasm and
patch-src-arch-i386-x86_cpu_caps_detect_prk.nasm added to
audio/openal/files tell nasm that code section has begun; the
resulting library changes the functions from undefined internally to
being present in the text sections as reported by nm.
  I only attacked the problems I have had personally and do not know
if more code is not being compiled into the library correctly. 

diff -ruN openal.bak/files/patch-src-arch-i386-memcpy_mmx_prk.nasm openal/files/patch-src-arch-i386-memcpy_mmx_prk.nasm
--- openal.bak/files/patch-src-arch-i386-memcpy_mmx_prk.nasm    1969-12-31 17:00:00.000000000 -0700
+++ openal/files/patch-src-arch-i386-memcpy_mmx_prk.nasm    2009-02-15 02:29:40.000000000 -0700
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+--- src/arch/i386/memcpy_mmx_prk.nasm.orig    2009-02-14 01:59:04.000000000 -0700
++++ src/arch/i386/memcpy_mmx_prk.nasm    2009-02-14 02:06:01.000000000 -0700
+@@ -22,6 +22,7 @@
+ ; pretty straight-forward implementation
+ ; by design broken for n<8, so check that before calling
+ ; x86 32 bit only!
++[Section .text]
+ global __alMMXmemcpy
+ global _alMMXmemcpy
+ 
diff -ruN openal.bak/files/patch-src-arch-i386-x86_cpu_caps_detect_prk.nasm openal/files/patch-src-arch-i386-x86_cpu_caps_detect_prk.nasm
--- openal.bak/files/patch-src-arch-i386-x86_cpu_caps_detect_prk.nasm    1969-12-31 17:00:00.000000000 -0700
+++ openal/files/patch-src-arch-i386-x86_cpu_caps_detect_prk.nasm    2009-02-15 02:29:40.000000000 -0700
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+--- src/arch/i386/x86_cpu_caps_detect_prk.nasm.orig    2009-02-14 02:16:32.000000000 -0700
++++ src/arch/i386/x86_cpu_caps_detect_prk.nasm    2009-02-14 02:17:24.000000000 -0700
+@@ -23,6 +23,7 @@
+ ; using infos from sandpile.org
+ 
+ ; returns 0 if no CPUID available
++[Section .text]
+ global __alDetectx86CPUCaps
+ global _alDetectx86CPUCaps
+
